news.title: NRIs looking to park your dollars? Ujjivan SFB offers 7.5%, DBS up to 5.6% on FCNR deposits
news.description: Banks are raising returns on FCNR(B) deposits after the RBI eased norms to attract foreign currency inflows. Ujjivan Small Finance Bank now offers 7.5% on 3–5-year USD FCNR deposits, while DBS Bank India provides up to 5.6%, giving NRIs more attractive options to park their dollar savings.
